LanguageData.MyMod_Tier3Helmet.label: Flying Tigers Elite Helmet
LanguageData.MyMod_Tier3Helmet.description: Elite combat helmet from the Flying Tigers unit. Provides exceptional protection against bullets, blunt attacks, and electrical damage. Enhanced with advanced materials for maximum defense.
LanguageData.MyMod_Tier3Armor.label: Flying Tigers Elite Armor
LanguageData.MyMod_Tier3Armor.description: Elite combat armor from the Flying Tigers unit. Provides exceptional protection against bullets, blunt attacks, and electrical damage. Features superior mobility and environmental resistance.
